name: nav_icons
description: Three bottom-navigation icons sharing one identity: a cream shopping bag with a teal ribbon bow (shop); a glossy green rounded play-button badge with a white triangle (play); a warm golden gear (settings).
prompt_extra: identical rendering, outline and lighting across all three; each icon fully fills its cell height

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
